description: A plain screenshot of an online news article header on a white background, showing only the outlet's native typography rather than any agency-designed graphic. A large bold black headline reads 'Waubonsee opens new Technical Education Center as student interest in trades grows.' Below it is a byline 'Northern Public Radio | By Peter Medlin' (the author's name in blue), a row of social-share icons (Facebook, X, LinkedIn, and email), and a gray timestamp 'Published September 9, 2025 at 4:00 AM CDT.' This is the second image in the same tweet promoting growth in the skilled trades; the agency reposted the news screenshot as supporting evidence for its 'Golden Age of the Skilled Trades' claim. It is a media screenshot, not a designed meme/poster. Target audience: supporters and general public seeking third-party validation.
notable_text: Waubonsee opens new Technical Education Center as student interest in trades grows
